# UC-22.15.3 · OT Security Awareness Training Completion

## Description

Measures completion of OT-specific training by role so awareness obligations for personnel working on IACS are auditable.

## Value

Gives the responsible team auditor-ready evidence for IEC 62443 compliance by automating regulatory compliance evidence using indexes hr_lms and sourcetypes lms:ot_training. Replaces manual evidence gathering with a continuous Splunk search that produces structured, time-stamped artefacts suitable for regulatory examination and internal audit review.

## Implementation

(1) Ingest LMS extracts with privacy minimization; (2) map mandatory courses per role in policy; (3) join to AD only on approved fields; (4) alert managers for overdue learners. Indexes required: `index=hr_lms`; Sourcetypes: `sourcetype=lms:ot_training`.

## Detailed Implementation

Prerequisites
• Install and configure the required add-on or app: Splunk DB Connect (2686) or HEC from LMS.
• Ensure the following data sources are available: `index=hr_lms` `sourcetype="lms:ot_training"`.
• For app installation, inputs.conf, and Splunk directory layout, see the Implementation guide: docs/implementation-guide.md

Step 1 — Configure data collection
(1) Ingest LMS extracts with privacy minimization; (2) map mandatory courses per role in policy; (3) join to AD only on approved fields; (4) alert managers for overdue learners.

Step 2 — Create the search and alert
Run the following SPL in Search (then save as report or alert; adjust time range and threshold as needed):

```spl
index=hr_lms sourcetype="lms:ot_training" earliest=-400d
| where like(lower(course_code),"%otsec%") OR like(lower(course_code),"%ics%")
| eval done_epoch=strptime(completed_date,"%Y-%m-%d")
| stats latest(done_epoch) as last_done by employee_id, role
| eval days_since=round((now()-last_done)/86400,0)
| where isnull(last_done) OR days_since>365
| sort - days_since
```

Understanding this SPL

**OT Security Awareness Training Completion (IEC 62443-2-1 / 4.3.2.6)** — Measures completion of OT-specific training by role so awareness obligations for personnel working on IACS are auditable.

Documented **Data sources**: `index=hr_lms` `sourcetype="lms:ot_training"`. **App/TA** (typical add-on context): Splunk DB Connect (2686) or HEC from LMS. The SPL below should target the same indexes and sourcetypes you configured for that feed—rename `index=` / `sourcetype=` if your deployment differs.

The first pipeline stage scopes events using **index**: hr_lms; **sourcetype**: lms:ot_training. That sourcetype matches what this use case lists under Data sources.

**Pipeline walkthrough**

• Scopes the data: index=hr_lms, sourcetype="lms:ot_training", time bounds. Cross-check against **Data sources** above so indexes and sourcetypes match your ingestion.
• Filters the current rows with `where like(lower(course_code),"%otsec%") OR like(lower(course_code),"%ics%")` — typically the threshold or rule expression for this monitoring goal.
• `eval` defines or adjusts **done_epoch** — often to normalize units, derive a ratio, or prepare for thresholds.
• `stats` rolls up events into metrics; results are split **by employee_id, role** so each row reflects one combination of those dimensions.
• `eval` defines or adjusts **days_since** — often to normalize units, derive a ratio, or prepare for thresholds.
• Filters the current rows with `where isnull(last_done) OR days_since>365` — typically the threshold or rule expression for this monitoring goal.
• Orders rows with `sort` — combine with `head`/`tail` for top-N patterns.


Step 3 — Validate
Compare with the OT engineering record and session recording the control owner would use in an investigation. Spot-check a few source events, reconcile counts, and verify field extractions, thresholds, and index permissions for the people who need this evidence.

Step 4 — Operationalize
Add the search to a dashboard or set up alert actions (email, webhook, PagerDuty, etc.) as required. Document the use case in your runbook and assign an owner. Consider visualizations: Table (overdue), Bar (completions/month), Single value (% current).

## SPL

```spl
index=hr_lms sourcetype="lms:ot_training" earliest=-400d
| where like(lower(course_code),"%otsec%") OR like(lower(course_code),"%ics%")
| eval done_epoch=strptime(completed_date,"%Y-%m-%d")
| stats latest(done_epoch) as last_done by employee_id, role
| eval days_since=round((now()-last_done)/86400,0)
| where isnull(last_done) OR days_since>365
| sort - days_since
```

## Visualization

Table (overdue), Bar (completions/month), Single value (% current). Key fields: `days_since`, `done_epoch`, `employee_id`, `last_done`, `role`.
